name: HELLP SYNDROME
definition: Hemolysis, Elevated Liver enzymes, Low Platelets

demographics.Prevalence: 4-12% of patients with severe preeclampsia / eclampsia; higher in White women
demographics.Histo: portal areas surrounded by deposited fibrin + hemorrhage + hepatocellular necrosis

dominant_finding: intraparenchymal hemorrhage of liver ← subcapsular hematoma / rupture into peritoneal
discriminating_features: fatty infiltration of liver (peak at 35th week)
intraparenchymal hemorrhage of liver ← subcapsular hematoma / rupture into peritoneal

general: fatty infiltration of liver (peak at 35th week)
intraparenchymal hemorrhage of liver ← subcapsular hematoma / rupture into peritoneal
